<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Update a project-level Kargo Role virtual resource"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/v1beta1/projects/{project}/roles/{role}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update a project-level Kargo Role virtual resource by updating
the underlying Kubernetes ServiceAccount, Role, and RoleBinding
resources.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
